conversations.title: Summary density gate tuning
conversations.snippet: Investigate sparse unresolved and next-step output.

conversations.title: Weekly render cleanup
conversations.snippet: Remove noisy fragments in weekly cards.

conversations.title: Prompt evidence mapping
conversations.snippet: Bind claims to concrete evidence rows.

conversations.title: Semantic repair loop
conversations.snippet: Define issue codes and degrade policy.

highlights: The team finalized a semantic gate to stop low-signal weekly fragments before they reach readers.
Every non-trivial claim is now mapped to explicit evidence rows with conversation references.
A two-round repair path was added, followed by a controlled degrade path when semantic quality still fails.
recurring_questions: How can we preserve factual grounding while increasing list density through semantic repair?

cross_domain_echoes.shared_logic: Both layers enforce strict boundaries to block low-signal output from escaping into final presentation.

unresolved_threads: The trade-off between repair latency and output quality still needs a measurable budget policy.
suggested_focus: Build a dedicated regression suite that stresses semantic gate behavior under high-noise weekly inputs.

evidence.note: Discussed density gate thresholds and sparse list regressions.
Defined semantic issue codes and degrade criteria.
